name: HustleGame
short_description: The new version of "HustleGameV2: The Way of Time" will be updated in March 2025, so stay tuned! In the new version, the gameplay and content have been greatly increased, and it strives to create a fantasy adventure for players that spans time and space.
detailed_description:
The new version of "HustleGameV2: The Way of Time" will be updated in March 2025, so stay tuned!

How many secrets are buried in the long river of time?

"Shu Moment: The Way of Time" is a personal independent game built with the UE5 engine. It takes "time travel" as its core, integrates oriental Zen and fantasy adventure, and presents a magnificent world spanning ancient and modern times.

The game has completed the development of the first major level, including four major maps: Muye Town, Zhongnan Mountain Town, Lake Bottom Maze, and Demon Valley, as well as hidden levels "Meow" and "Lost Temple". Players will travel through time and explore mysterious events in different historical periods.

From the ancient Zhongnan Secret Realm to the turbulent streets of the Republic of China, from the abyss maze at the bottom of the dark lake to the demon valley surrounded by fog, every place is full of challenges and unknowns.

The game mechanism, with parkour, puzzle solving, and combat as its core, combined with free exploration through time and space, allows players to experience completely different gameplay experiences in different eras: fast body movements, mysterious mechanism puzzles, and exciting and tense combat systems. In addition, the game emphasizes the splicing of clues and the deduction of stories. Players need to find the truth in the fragments of time and space and piece together bits of history into a complete picture.

In terms of plot, "Moment·The Way of Time" presents the complex relationship between the Time Administration, the three major sects (Taoism, Asceticism, and Light) and the secret rebel organization Mojiao to players through multiple narratives. Who controls the fate of mankind? Does the order of time need absolute "perfection"? The game explores the conflict between freedom and order through in-depth plots, triggering players' thinking about time and fate.

As an independent game developed by individuals, "Moment·The Way of Time" strives to create a fantasy adventure journey across time and space and explore the truth for players through a unique artistic style and profound themes. Time flows, and a moment appears. In the future, more new scenes and gameplay content will be introduced. Let us look forward to this grand time and space adventure together!
